message: update bundle to check that all run OK; update medicaid quality package to only download new datasets
try to rebuild package; separate out washpost from schoolvaxview
fix wisqars download to get age groups
move NCHS stuff from chronic to OD bundle
run the build on full pipeline

info.long_name: Provisional drug overdose death count
info.short_description: Provisional count of drug overdose deaths. State-level data are 12-month rolling totals; county-level data are monthly.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths from drug overdose. State-level values (data.csv.gz) are 12-month backward rolling totals. County-level values (data_county.csv.gz) are monthly provisional counts. Data are provisional and subject to revision. Counts of 1–9 at the county level are suppressed by NCHS and imputed as 5; see suppressed_flag.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional drug overdose deaths.

info.long_name: NCHS county drug overdose death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the county drug overdose death count was suppressed by NCHS. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the county-level drug overdose death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. County-level only (data_county.csv.gz).
info.statement: The drug overdose death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: Percent of death records pending investigation
info.short_description: Percentage of death records still pending investigation for the reporting period.
info.long_description: Percentage of death records that are still under investigation (e.g., awaiting toxicology results or cause-of-death determination). Records pending investigation may have incomplete drug involvement information. Available at the state level (data.csv.gz) and county level (data_county.csv.gz).
info.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were pending investigation as of {time}.

info.long_name: Age-adjusted all-cause mortality rate
info.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from all causes per 100,000 population.
info.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for all causes of death, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted all-cause mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

info.long_name: Age-adjusted Alzheimer's disease mortality rate
info.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from Alzheimer's disease per 100,000 population.
info.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for Alzheimer's disease, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted Alzheimer's disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

info.long_name: Age-adjusted COVID-19 mortality rate
info.short_description: Quarterly age-adjusted death rate from COVID-19 per 100,000 population.
info.long_description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rate for COVID-19, expressed per 100,000 population. Based on 3-month period estimates. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted COVID-19 mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 for the quarter ending {time}.

message: fixes issues with WashPost county encoding that was breaking ingestion
update all metadata files tofill in source info and ensure proper formatting; correct formatting on newer process.json files
run the build on full pipeline
init provisional mortality for opioid OD

info.long_name: Provisional cocaine overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
info.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving cocaine.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving cocaine (ICD-10 T40.5), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional cocaine overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

info.long_name: Provisional heroin overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
info.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving heroin.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving heroin (ICD-10 T40.1), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional heroin overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

info.long_name: Provisional methadone overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
info.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving methadone.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving methadone (ICD-10 T40.3), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional methadone overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

info.long_name: Provisional opioid overdose death count (12-month rolling total)
info.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional death counts involving natural, semi-synthetic, or synthetic opioids including methadone.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths involving natural, semi-synthetic, and synthetic opioids including methadone (ICD-10 T40.2–T40.4), reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional opioid overdose deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

info.long_name: Provisional all-cause death count (12-month rolling total)
info.short_description: 12-month rolling total of provisional all-cause death counts.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths from all causes, reported as a 12-month backward rolling total. Data are provisional and subject to revision as death certificates are processed. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional all-cause deaths in the 12 months ending {time}.

info.long_name: Provisional drug overdose death count
info.short_description: Provisional count of drug overdose deaths. State-level data are 12-month rolling totals; county-level data are monthly.
info.long_description: Provisional count of deaths from drug overdose. State-level values (data.csv.gz) are 12-month backward rolling totals. County-level values (data_county.csv.gz) are monthly provisional counts. Data are provisional and subject to revision. Counts of 1–9 at the county level are suppressed by NCHS and imputed as 5; see suppressed_flag.
info.statement: In {location}, there were {value} provisional drug overdose deaths.

info.long_name: Percent of death records complete
info.short_description: Percentage of death records that have been fully processed for the reporting period.
info.long_description: Percentage of death records that are complete (i.e., not pending investigation or correction) for the given state and time period. Higher values indicate more finalized data. National and state level.
info.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were complete as of {time}.

info.long_name: Percent of death records pending investigation
info.short_description: Percentage of death records still pending investigation for the reporting period.
info.long_description: Percentage of death records that are still under investigation (e.g., awaiting toxicology results or cause-of-death determination). Records pending investigation may have incomplete drug involvement information. Available at the state level (data.csv.gz) and county level (data_county.csv.gz).
info.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were pending investigation as of {time}.

info.long_name: NCHS heroin death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the heroin death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the heroin death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The heroin death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: NCHS methadone death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the methadone death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the methadone death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The methadone death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: NCHS cocaine death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the cocaine death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the cocaine death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The cocaine death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: NCHS opioid death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the opioid death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the opioid death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The opioid death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: NCHS all-cause death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the all-cause death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the all-cause death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The all-cause death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

info.long_name: NCHS state drug overdose death count suppression flag
info.short_description: Indicates whether the state drug overdose death count was suppressed by NCHS.
info.long_description: Value is 1 if the state-level drug overdose death count was suppressed by NCHS and 0 otherwise. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed to be 5. State-level (data.csv.gz).
info.statement: The drug overdose death count for {location} at {time} was suppressed ({value}).

nchs_vsrr_state.name: NCHS VSRR Provisional Drug Overdose Death Counts (State)
nchs_vsrr_state.description: Provisional monthly counts of drug overdose deaths by type of drug, reported as 12-month backward rolling totals. Includes deaths involving cocaine, heroin, methadone, and opioids broadly. Data are from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program and are provisional, meaning they are subject to revision as more death certificates are received and processed. Covers national and state levels. New York City and New York State are combined.
nchs_vsrr_state.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs_vsrr_county.name: NCHS VSRR Provisional County-Level Drug Overdose Death Counts
nchs_vsrr_county.description: Provisional monthly counts of drug overdose deaths at the county level, from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program. Data are provisional and subject to revision. Counts of 1–9 deaths are suppressed to protect privacy and imputed as 5; the suppressed_flag column identifies these records.
nchs_vsrr_county.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs_vsrr_quarterly.name: NCHS VSRR Quarterly Provisional Estimates for Selected Indicators of Mortality
nchs_vsrr_quarterly.description: Provisional quarterly age-adjusted mortality rates for 21 selected causes of death, from the Vital Statistics Rapid Release (VSRR) program. Rates are based on 3-month period estimates and are expressed per 100,000 population. Covers national and state levels. Data are provisional and subject to revision.
nchs_vsrr_quarterly.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
